# kaedax

> An AI-native software studio headquartered in Bengaluru. We ship agent-first
> software products on a 720-hour cycle — scoping, building, testing, deploying,
> and monitoring as a single loop where agents handle volume and humans hold
> the bar. Curated intake: two engagements per cycle.

This file is here because we're an agent-first studio; it would be inconsistent
to have a site that wasn't readable by agents.

## Positioning

- **Agent-first development** — agents own the delivery loop (scope, build, qa, deploy, monitor, ops); humans own taste, judgement, and the awkward call.
- **720-hour cycle** — every engagement fits in 30 days, 720 hours, or it doesn't fit at kaedax.
- **Bengaluru HQ, global delivery** — we work in your time zone, in your repo, with your stack.
- **Curated intake** — two engagements per cycle, founders only, fixed scope, fixed timeline.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://kaedax.com/): The 720-hour delivery promise, the agent stack, recent work, FAQ.
- [Process](https://kaedax.com/process): The full delivery process — thesis, how an engagement starts, the loop, human moments, security posture, vertical posture, Bengaluru HQ, what we won't take on.
- [Work](https://kaedax.com/work): Anonymized case studies across fintech, healthtech, ecommerce, insurance, and B2C.
- [Verticals](https://kaedax.com/verticals): What we build per industry — pain points, deliverables, compliance posture, and FAQ for each.

## Vertical pages (what kaedax builds, by industry)

Each page answers: what we build in that vertical, the domain-specific pain
points we're hired for, compliance posture, cost/timeline FAQs, and proof.

- [Fintech software development](https://kaedax.com/fintech-software-development): Underwriting consoles, payment flows, KYC/AML onboarding — audit trails and PCI-aware architecture in a 30-day cycle.
- [Healthtech software development](https://kaedax.com/healthtech-software-development): HIPAA-aware clinician consoles, AI scribes, patient workflows — PHI handling and eval harnesses from the spec.
- [Insurance software development](https://kaedax.com/insurance-software-development): Quote-to-bind APIs, partner consoles, claims workflows — regulator-aware SLAs and evidence trails.
- [Ecommerce development](https://kaedax.com/ecommerce-development): Configurators, headless storefronts, ERP-connected ops for brands that outgrew their platform.
- [Consumer app development](https://kaedax.com/consumer-app-development): Community platforms and creator tools with live-ops, moderation, and trust & safety from day one.
- [AI agent development](https://kaedax.com/ai-agent-development): Production agents and AI features — eval harness first, MCP tool contracts, refusal layers.
- [Internal tools development](https://kaedax.com/internal-tools-development): Ops consoles, workflow automation, and dashboards that replace spreadsheet operations.
- [Proptech software development](https://kaedax.com/proptech-software-development): Property management consoles, listing engines, underwriting tools — integration-first.
- [Marketplace development](https://kaedax.com/marketplace-development): Two-sided platforms with escrow payments, matching, and trust systems engineered for liquidity.
- [Legaltech software development](https://kaedax.com/legaltech-software-development): Matter management, document automation, eval-gated AI review — privilege-aware throughout.
- [EdTech software development](https://kaedax.com/edtech-software-development): AI-learning platforms, LMS and classroom tools, assessment engines — DPDP-compliant child-data handling, vernacular-ready, low-bandwidth first.

## Live product demos

Every vertical page links a working interactive demo of a representative
product — sample data, real interactions, each with a domain guardrail moment
(committee referral, privilege hold, release gate, welfare protocol).

- [underwrite · fintech credit console](https://kaedax.com/demos/underwrite)
- [caduceus · clinical AI scribe console](https://kaedax.com/demos/caduceus)
- [anchor · embedded-insurance binding](https://kaedax.com/demos/anchor)
- [bough · made-to-order ecommerce ops](https://kaedax.com/demos/bough)
- [pulse · consumer trust & safety](https://kaedax.com/demos/pulse)
- [tallow · agent evals & release gates](https://kaedax.com/demos/tallow)
- [harbor · warehouse ops console](https://kaedax.com/demos/harbor)
- [meridian · property management](https://kaedax.com/demos/meridian)
- [atrium · marketplace operations](https://kaedax.com/demos/atrium)
- [counselworks · privilege-aware legal review](https://kaedax.com/demos/counselworks)

## Flagship product demo

- [Gurukul — the AI classroom](https://kaedax.com/gurukul): A fully interactive demo of an AI-curriculum learning platform for Indian schools and colleges — courses teaching AI development and breakthroughs (aligned to CBSE AI skill subject 417/843 and NEP 2020), auto-graded quizzes, progress tracking, and a teacher console. Built in one 720-hour cycle.
- [School AI-readiness check](https://kaedax.com/gurukul/readiness): Free 2-minute, no-sign-up self-assessment for principals — scores a school across policy, teacher capability, curriculum, infrastructure, parent engagement, and DPDP data protection, with prioritised next steps.
- [Gurukul for schools](https://kaedax.com/gurukul/schools): The decision-maker page — what a school gets (CBSE 417/843 curriculum, guardrailed AI tutor, faculty console, teacher enablement, parent reporting), the one-term rollout plan, and answers to the questions principals ask.

## Case studies

- [LATTICE · Fintech · SMB credit](https://kaedax.com/work/lattice-fintech): Underwriting console with bureau integrations, audit-grade decisioning, parallel-run cutover.
- [BOUGH · Ecom · DTC home goods](https://kaedax.com/work/bough-ecom): Made-to-order configurator replacing an outgrown Shopify; +38% configurator-to-checkout conversion.
- [CADUCEUS · Healthtech · Chronic care](https://kaedax.com/work/caduceus-healthtech): Clinician console with an AI scribe; 94% scribe accuracy gated by an evaluation harness.
- [ANCHOR · Insurance · Embedded](https://kaedax.com/work/anchor-insurance): Quote-to-bind API and partner console for gig-worker insurance; sub-1.4s end-to-end.
- [PULSE · B2C · Creator community](https://kaedax.com/work/pulse-b2c): Community-first creator platform launched from a 4,000-person waitlist with zero ops headcount.
- [GURUKUL · EdTech · AI classroom](https://kaedax.com/work/gurukul-edtech): AI-literacy learning platform for a 14-school network — live public demo at kaedax.com/gurukul.

## Field notes

- [Why 720 hours is the right delivery window](https://kaedax.com/blog/why-720-hours)
- [The agent stack we use to ship in 30 days](https://kaedax.com/blog/agent-stack)
- [What 'agent-first development' actually means](https://kaedax.com/blog/agent-first-development)
- [MCP is the right contract for agent tools](https://kaedax.com/blog/mcp-tool-contracts)
- [The refusal layer is the product](https://kaedax.com/blog/refusal-layer-is-the-product)
- [Why we build the eval harness before we build the agent](https://kaedax.com/blog/eval-harness-first)

## How engagements start

1. **Brief** — send us one paragraph. We respond in 24 hours, from a founder, with yes / not-now / not-us.
2. **Scope call** — 45 minutes with a founder and the engineer who'd lead. Same call, we tell you if it fits a 720-hour cycle.
3. **Discovery sprint** — 5 working days under mutual NDA. You receive a draft `spec.md`, an ADR shortlist, a fixed-scope proposal.
4. **Cycle** — 720 hours from kickoff to production cutover, followed by 30 to 60 days of post-launch on-call.

## What we won't take

- Multi-product platforms (do not fit 720h)
- Pure design or pure strategy engagements (we ship code)
- Regulated builds where we'd be the auditor of record (we partner with your compliance counsel)
- Engagements where the founder wants to outsource taste
- White-label work that obscures who built what
